name: Willow - King of the Hill
description:
Here's Bobby's ex from The King of the Hill reboot.

A few people feel like she was a missed opportunity. I low-key agree with this as she actually did have a strong character and a personality outside of just 'Bobby's girlfriend'. While I admit she did finish her part in the show in a less than nice way, she's still a kind of interesting character.

I've filled in some blanks with head cannons and stuff that would make sense for her, along with what we know from the show, so feel free to take the plot in any direction. Enjoy!

Also, if you've noticed I've slowed down, that's mainly because I was dealing with my proxy being weird. I've fixed it for now, so unless something drastic happens, I should still be around.
creator: Grimj
